projectDescription: A zero-config, lightweight utility-first CSS engine with automatic light/dark mode, distributed via CDN or ES module.
keyFeatures: Zero-config: auto-initializes on DOMContentLoaded with no build step required
Automatic light/dark mode via prefers-color-scheme and manual .dark/.light class overrides
Utility-first class system covering spacing, colors, typography, layout, flexbox, grid, and more
Semantic color tokens that automatically switch between light and dark values
CDN-ready IIFE build and ES module export for modern bundlers
Runtime CSS generation with MutationObserver for dynamic content
publicApiSurface: TSS.refresh() — re-scans DOM and generates any missing utility CSS
TSS.toggleDark() — toggles dark/light mode and persists to localStorage
TSS.parse(className) — parses a utility class name and returns { selector, rules }
parseClass(className) — named export: pure parser function
buildThemeCSS() — named export: generates the full theme CSS string with CSS custom properties
